Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast recipes (and coffee!) to the table.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Emeril and food critic Ian McNulty make classic New Orleans cuisine.
Video.title: with Ian McNulty

Video.summary: Emeril and Abita CEO Dave Blossman enjoy a beer-centric menu.
Video.title: with Dave Blossman

Video.summary: Emeril celebrates Louisiana blue crabs. (Did you know Louisiana is the country's biggest producer?)
Video.title: Louisiana Blue Crabs

Video.summary: New England Patriots superfan Kim Mello join forces to create New England eats with a New Orleans twist.
Video.title: Boston

Video.summary: Emeril and Voodoo priestesses Brandi and Maggie celebrate New Orleans' annual Voodoo Fest.
Video.title: with Mambo Brandi, Mambo Maggie

Video.summary: Emeril shares the tale of two Louisiana surfers who stumbled on the perfect seaside snack!
Video.title: A Surfer's Discovery: Sea Beans

Video.summary: Emeril prepares dishes with saffron grown right in the southern United States.
Video.title: Saffron from the South

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Bau Nguyen draw inspiration from Vietnamese dishes.
Video.title: with Bau Nguyen

Video.summary: Emeril and jazz legend Kermit Ruffins classic New Orleans cuisine.
Video.title: with Kermit Ruffins

Video.summary: After a visit to Louisiana's largest pecan farm, Emeril shares his favorite recipes.
Video.title: Pecan Paradise

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Chef Aaron Sanchez enjoy a Cuban-inspired menu, with a New Orleans spin.
Video.title: with Aaron Sanchez

Video.summary: Emeril, Lindsey Brower, and Nan Wallis create a mouth-watering meal inspired by locally-brewed sake.
Video.title: with Lindsey Brower, Nan Wallis

Video.summary: Emeril's friends Maggie Long and Cyrus Lester share a meal incorporating fresh mushrooms from their farm.
Video.title: with Mushroom Maggie's

Video.summary: Denver superfan Catherine Highland, aka The Bronco Babe, grills up dishes to honor the state of Colorado.
Video.title: Denver

Video.summary: Emeril and Buffalo Bills superfan Lindsey Kszos takes inspiration from her city's famous wings.
Video.title: Buffalo

Video.summary: Emeril's collard greens recipes, inspired by Farmer Jones' fresh produce.
Video.title: Collard Greens For All

Video.summary: Emeril whips up Big Freedia's favorite southern meal.
Video.title: with Big Freedia

Video.summary: For a Tampa Bay-style tailgate, treat your guests to Emeril's grilled fish with coconut rice.
Video.title: Tampa Bay Buccaneers

Video.summary: For a Seattle style tailgate, Emeril whips up his crowd-pleasing cedar planked salmon.
Video.title: Seattle Seahawks

Video.summary: Emeril highlights Morning Glory, an invasive vegetable grown only by special permission.
Video.title: Illegal Greens: Morning Glory

Video.summary: For a Cincinnati-style tailgate, Emeril's Ohio favorites will make you the MVP of any party.
Video.title: Cincinnati Bengals

Video.summary: Tennessee Titans superfans Isaiah Washington and Jameson Greer take Southern home cooking to new heights.
Video.title: Nashville

Video.summary: Emeril helps a 49ers superfan cook up some crowd-pleasing Bay Area seafood dishes.
Video.title: San Francisco

Video.summary: Home-Style French, Roasted Chicken, Corn Bread Pudding, Croquignoles Bread
Video.title: Creole Breads

Video.summary: Berry Ice Cream Pie with Whipped Cream; Chocolate and Coffee Bonbons
Video.title: It's All About Ice Cream

Video.summary: Summer Chills: Emeril's Kicked-Up Bellini Cocktail, Potted Shrimp, Fig Syllabub
Video.title: Summer Chills

Video.summary: Emeril and Chef Shermond Esteen prepare dishes inspired by Shermond's brunch menu.
Video.title: with Shermond Esteen

Video.summary: Emeril and Kimberly Patton-Bragg create a holiday menu around New Orleans' official cocktail, the Sazerac.
Video.title: with Kim Patton-Bragg

Video.summary: Emeril and his friend Justin Kennedy of Parkway Bakery and Tavern prepare a menu with classic New Orleans sandwiches, from the classic Po' boy to Muffuletta.
Video.title: with Justin Kennedy

Video.summary: Emeril and interns Asia Magee and Chassidy Carter take on dishes made at Cafe Reconcile. Get ready to try Emeril's classic Crab Cakes, Fried Green Tomatoes, and Pineapple Cornbread.
Video.title: with Asia Magree, Chassidy Carter

Video.summary: Emeril and interns Asia Magee and Chassidy Carter take on classic down-home dishes made at Cafe Reconcile.
Video.title: with Asia Magree, Chassidy Carter

Video.summary: Nothing says Washington, D.C. like Emeril's crispy chicken wings with mumbo sauce.
Video.title: Washington Commanders

Video.summary: Emeril welcomes Pittsburgh Steelers superfan Brad Younkin and takes inspiration from his city's Polish roots to create chorizo-stuffed cabbage rolls and beer braised sausages.
Video.title: Pittsburgh

Video.summary: Emeril helps Chicago Bears fan Edgar Mejia put a New Orleans spin on hotdogs and deep dish pizza.
Video.title: Chicago

Video.summary: Miami Dolphins superfan Seth Farmer and his girlfriend, Julia Thompson, inspire Emeril's tailgating creations.
Video.title: Miami

Video.summary: Atlanta Falcons superfan Thomas Dunn draws from his city's Southern delicacies.
Video.title: Atlanta

Video.summary: Emeril joins Cleveland Browns superfan Ray Prisby to cook up Ohio-inspired dishes.
Video.title: Cleveland
